title: henckelia quinquevulnera
intro: Henckelia quinquevulnera, also known as five wounds plant, is a flowering plant species native to the Himalayas and Southeast Asia. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever and promoting wound healing, and has been used in folk medicine to treat various ailments. Henckelia quinquevulnera can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and extracts, which are often used to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
